headline: IBM Has Fallen 16% as Anthropic Puts Them In The Bullseye
summary: Still one of the biggest names in the computing world, IBM (NYSE:IBM) shed over 16% year to date heading into mid-March, a jarring reversal for a stock that closed Q4 earnings at $314.84 with momentum. What was driving this result? Well, on February 23, Anthropic announced its Claude Code tool could automate the COBOL modernization ... IBM Has Fallen 16% as Anthropic Puts Them In The Bullseye

headline: IBM Quantum Security Push With Bain Puts New Focus On Enterprise Workloads
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) and Bain & Company announced a collaboration to help private equity and corporate clients address cybersecurity risks linked to quantum computing through post quantum cryptography solutions. IBM released what it describes as the industry's first quantum centric supercomputing reference architecture, combining quantum and classical computing for scientific workloads such as molecular simulation and materials science. For investors watching NYSE:IBM, these moves come as the...

headline: STX Stock Beats Industry Returns in 3 Months: Right Time to Invest?
summary: Seagate rides the AI data boom as HAMR-based Mozaic drives gain cloud traction and nearline capacity is booked through 2026. High debt remains a risk.

headline: Bain & Company announces strategic collaboration with IBM to deliver post-quantum cryptography assessment to private equity and corporate clients
summary: Bain & Company today announced it will work with IBM to deliver expertise to private equity and corporate clients on post-quantum cryptography risks and strategic mitigations.

headline: AI in Life Sciences Market, 2026-2040 Industry Trends and Global Forecasts - IBM, IQVIA and Oracle Lead Data Platforms While Roche, Pfizer and AI Startups Accelerate Drug Discovery Innovation
summary: AI in life sciences presents key opportunities in drug discovery, personalized medicine, and diagnostics by leveraging vast datasets for precise, cost-effective solutions. Growth is driven by increased data, demand for precision therapies, and partnerships with tech leaders, despite challenges in costs and regulation.
